name: virtual-company
description: Virtual Company Platform — platform agent AI yang divisualkan sebagai kantor 2D. Lihat virtual-company-platform-plan.md.

scripts.review:codex: codex exec -s workspace-write "Baca dan ikuti AGENTS.md lalu infra/codex/REVIEW.md, kemudian kerjakan tugas review di sana (bug hunt verifikasi 2x ke docs BUGLIST, temuan kualitas ke docs CODE_REVIEW, dan verifikasi entri berstatus FIXED)."
scripts.review:codex:all: codex exec -s workspace-write "Baca AGENTS.md lalu infra/codex/REVIEW.md bagian 'Sweep menyeluruh Phase 0-3'. Lakukan review BUG HUNT MENYELURUH atas SELURUH kode Phase 0-3 (bukan hanya diff terakhir): packages/shared, packages/agent-runtime, packages/templates, apps/server (migrasi DB MySQL/mysql2 store async + dialek MariaDB, dispatch directive, realtime, DAN Workflow Engine apps/server/src/workflow/engine.ts: interpretasi WorkflowDef/loop_until_pass/approval_gate, persist workflow_runs, resume approval, engine data-driven tanpa hardcode marketing), apps/web (animasi agent:event, composer arahan, WorkflowPanel approval, Task Board). Verifikasi 2x tiap temuan, tulis bug ke docs/BUGLIST.md dan temuan kualitas ke docs/CODE_REVIEW.md dengan bukti file:line. Jangan ubah source code."
scripts.review:codex:p4: codex exec -s workspace-write "Baca AGENTS.md lalu infra/codex/REVIEW.md bagian 'Fokus review Phase 4 (aksi eksternal + keamanan)'. Lakukan review BUG HUNT keamanan atas seluruh kode Phase 4: apps/server/src/security/{vault,guardrails,auth}.ts, apps/server/src/db/{schema,store}.ts (tabel approvals/audit_entries + method baru), apps/server/src/workflow/engine.ts (makeGuardedApproval + grantApprovalId pra-otorisasi + persist approval + runStep status blocked), packages/agent-runtime/src/skills/{socialPost,playwrightPublisher}.ts, packages/agent-runtime/src/loop.ts (ctx.audit), packages/shared/src/skill.ts (AuditDraft/SkillContext.audit), apps/server/src/{realtime,main}.ts (io.use auth), apps/web/src/{api,socket}.ts. Fokus: (1) secret tak pernah ke log/prompt/audit detail & file vault terenkripsi; (2) approval gate tak bisa di-bypass — skill risky HANYA eksekusi pasca-gate, di luar itu default-deny; (3) guardrail rate_limit/posting_hours benar & gagal->blocked+audit; (4) least-privilege Playwright domain allowlist; (5) audit lengkap & ter-scope company; (6) auth REST+socket satu helper. Verifikasi 2x tiap temuan, tulis bug ke docs/BUGLIST.md & kualitas ke docs/CODE_REVIEW.md dgn bukti file:line. JUGA verifikasi entri FIXED: BUG-107 & BUG-108 (set VERIFIED_FIXED atau REOPENED) dan CR-101 berstatus ADDRESSED (set VERIFIED atau beri temuan). Observasi: npm test (87, butuh MySQL hidup), npm run build/lint/typecheck:web. Jangan ubah source code."
scripts.review:codex:p5: codex exec -s workspace-write "Baca AGENTS.md lalu infra/codex/REVIEW.md bagian 'Fokus review Phase 5 (generalisasi platform)'. Lakukan review BUG HUNT atas kode Phase 5: packages/templates/src/sales.ts, packages/agent-runtime/src/skills/sendOutreach.ts, apps/server/src/kpi/{kpi,recordUsage}.ts, apps/server/src/config/costRates.ts, packages/agent-runtime/src/loop.ts (akumulasi usage), packages/agent-runtime/src/router/{throttle,nineRouter}.ts (throttle + tier cooldown), apps/server/src/db/{schema,store}.ts (usage_events), apps/server/src/api/routes.ts (GET /api/companies/:id/kpi), apps/web/src/game/{OfficeScene,maps}.ts (multi-floor), apps/web/src/components/KpiDashboard.tsx. Fokus: (1) engine TETAP data-driven — tak ada hardcode sales/marketing di workflow/engine.ts, nol regresi Marketing saat dept ke-2; (2) send_outreach risky+approval-gated, channel allowlist menolak tak dikenal, ok:false/throw -> audit *_failed + run blocked; (3) KPI biaya benar (token nyata dari usage_events, agregasi per company/dept/tier/hari, biaya = token x tarif, computeKpi cuma baca DB tanpa LLM); (4) pencatatan usage tak menggagalkan kerja & tak double-count; (5) throttle FIFO tak ubah hasil/tak deadlock, tier cooldown tak kosongkan seluruh kandidat; (6) multi-floor swap map tak bocor (destroy layer lama) + grid dibangun ulang + fallback mapKey. Verifikasi 2x tiap temuan, tulis bug ke docs/BUGLIST.md & kualitas ke docs/CODE_REVIEW.md dgn bukti file:line. JUGA verifikasi entri FIXED: BUG-116 & BUG-117 (set VERIFIED_FIXED atau REOPENED) dan CR-110 berstatus ADDRESSED (set VERIFIED atau beri temuan). Observasi: npm test (104, butuh MySQL hidup), npm run build/lint/typecheck:web/build:web. Jangan ubah source code."
scripts.review:codex:p6: codex exec -s workspace-write "Baca AGENTS.md lalu infra/codex/REVIEW.md bagian 'Fokus review Phase 6 (app packaging)'. Lakukan review BUG HUNT atas kode Phase 6: apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/{lib,service,main}.rs + apps/desktop/src-tauri/{tauri.conf.json,Cargo.toml,capabilities/default.json}, apps/desktop/package.json, apps/web/src/{api,socket,desktop}.ts, apps/web/src/components/ServiceStatus.tsx, apps/web/src/App.tsx, apps/web/src/game/bootGame.ts, apps/web/src/styles.css, apps/web/.env.desktop, dan root package.json (scripts dev:desktop/build:desktop/build:web:desktop) + .gitignore + .env.example. Fokus: (1) Rust shell (BACA saja - Rust/MSVC belum terpasang di mesin ini, cargo/tauri build TAK bisa dijalankan): spawn node aman tanpa command injection (path entry dari env/resource/filesystem walk, BUKAN input user), proses anak di-kill saat window Destroyed + Drop (cek orphan saat crash), TOCTOU port_open saat start (spawn dobel), resolusi path resource_dir/ancestors benar, tak panic di jalur normal; (2) keamanan packaging (AGENTS.md sec 8): CSP connect-src least-privilege (hanya loopback :8787/:20128, TANPA wildcard), withGlobalTauri hanya mengekspos command kita ke bundle lokal tepercaya (script-src 'self', tak ada remote script), restart_server tak bisa disalahgunakan, desktop TIDAK mem-bypass auth (VITE_API_AUTH_TOKEN sama dgn API_AUTH_TOKEN), .env.desktop BUKAN secret & benar di-commit (pengecualian .gitignore); (3) NOL REGRESI browser (KRITIS): VITE_API_BASE_URL kosong -> BASE='/api' & io(opts) PERSIS perilaku lama (URL relatif, proxy Vite), SERVER_URL trailing-slash di-strip, auth header tetap terkirim; (4) deteksi Tauri no-op AMAN di browser (desktop.ts tak crash bila window.__TAURI__ absen, ServiceStatus render null tanpa polling/error); (5) Phaser mode FIT tak merusak pemetaan koordinat klik-untuk-berjalan (verifikasi di browser); (6) build:web:desktop (--mode desktop) meng-embed base URL tanpa bocor ke build browser biasa. Verifikasi 2x tiap temuan, tulis bug ke docs/BUGLIST.md & kualitas ke docs/CODE_REVIEW.md dgn bukti file:line. Observasi: npm run build + typecheck:web + lint + build:web + build:web:desktop + npm test (104, butuh MySQL hidup) + npm run tauri -- info (validasi config + lapor toolchain). Catatan: cargo build/tauri dev/tauri build = ranah owner (Rust belum terpasang) - tandai temuan yang butuh build untuk konfirmasi. Jangan ubah source code."
scripts.verify:codex: codex exec -s workspace-write "Baca AGENTS.md lalu infra/codex/REVIEW.md bagian VERIFIKASI. Verifikasi ulang tiap entri docs/BUGLIST.md berstatus FIXED: pastikan akar masalah hilang dan tak ada regresi, lalu set VERIFIED_FIXED atau REOPENED dengan bukti file:line."
